quotes.text: It’s your day to be a part of something great.
A day to take a first step.
A day to look forward to new challenges.
At Amazon, we believe that every day is still Day One.
Your day to make your ideas come to life.
We're making history and the good news is that we've only just begun.
We’re making history and the good news is that we’ve only just begun.
Every day across the world we develop the ideas, the services and the products that make life easier for tens of millions of customers, and good things happen faster.
We’ve revolutionized the online shopping experience, cloud computing and the book… join us and see what’s next!
We want you to help share and shape our mission to be Earth's most customer-centric company.
quotes.heading: Build your future with Amazon!

quotes.text: The most radical and transformative of inventions are often those that empower others to unleash their creativity — to pursue their dreams.
Join us, and you’ll not only see the future, you’ll create it.
It’s what we do, every day — and the good news is that we’ve only just begun.
Invent the future with Amazon Invention comes in many forms and at many scales.
And there’s still more to do: We want you to help share and shape our mission to be Earth’s most customer-centric company.
Play the amazon.jobs game, and guess what words really inspire us every day.
quotes.heading: Amazon.jobs-play the game!

quotes.text: We say that we're "Peculiar," but what does that mean?
quotes.heading: Amazon.jobs-play the game!

quotes.text: Success is measured against the possible, not the probable.
quotes.heading: we pioneer

quotes.text: For today’s pioneers, that’s exactly why there’s no place on Earth they’d rather build than Amazon.
quotes.heading: we pioneer

quotes.text: It's our job to make bold bets, and we get our energy from inventing on behalf of customers.
quotes.heading: we pioneer

quotes.text: We are a company of builders who bring varying backgrounds, ideas, and points of view to inventing on behalf of our customers.
quotes.heading: Diversity at Amazon

quotes.text: Thinking small is a self-fulfilling prophecy.
quotes.heading: Think Big

quotes.text: We work on behalf of our people to invent mechanisms for development like Career Choice.
quotes.heading: Hire and Develop the Best

quotes.text: As we do new things, we accept that we may be misunderstood for long periods of time.
quotes.heading: Invent and Simplify

quotes.text: Despite setbacks, they rise to the occasion and never settle.
quotes.heading: Deliver Results

quotes.text: Since then, we have expanded to create the best-selling e-reader family in the world.
quotes.heading: Amazon Devices

quotes.text: We have gone beyond Kindle with our powerhouse Fire tablets, built for work...
quotes.heading: Amazon Devices

quotes.text: Amazon introduced the first Kindle in 2007 - at that time, it offered 90,000 eBooks and sold out 5.5 hours after the announcement.
quotes.heading: Amazon Devices

quotes.text: Our mission is to be Earth's most customer-centric company.
quotes.heading: Come build the future with us

quotes.text: This is what unites Amazonians across teams and geographies as we are all striving to delight our customers and make their lives easier, one innovative product, service, and idea at a time.
quotes.heading: Come build the future with us

quotes.text: Every Amazonian, from warehouse floor to corporate HQ, shares a drive to impact the future, today.
quotes.heading: Impact the future, today

quotes.text: United by our peculiar culture of curiosity, bold ownership and fearless initiative, we channel our customer obsession into making everyday impact—big and small.
quotes.heading: Impact the future, today

quotes.text: Upskilling We’re investing billions of dollars to help our employees and our neighbors prepare for the jobs of the future.
quotes.heading: Working at Amazon

quotes.text: We offer free public tours to show what happens behind the scenes in our fulfillment centers around the world.
quotes.heading: Working at Amazon

quotes.text: Our unmatched scale offers every employee endless opportunities to reimagine how customers shop, stream, eat, connect and live.
quotes.heading: Impact the future, today
